Handpicked by the BlogVerse community — apps, platforms, and services we genuinely use and recommend.

📚Free
Best for students
Student Life

Notion (Free Forever Plan)

The ultimate workspace for students — notes, to-dos, projects, and budgets all in one place. Used by millions of college students.

🎓Free + Paid
Most popular
Student Life

Coursera — Learn from Top Universities

Courses from IITs, IIMs, Google, IBM and 200+ top institutions. Many free to audit. Perfect for upskilling alongside college.

Browse Free Courses
💡From ₹399
Best deals
Student Life

Udemy — Skill-Based Courses

Over 220,000 courses on coding, design, marketing, finance and more. Frequent sales bring prices down to ₹400–₹600.

Explore Courses
📈₹0 Commission
Editor's pick
Personal Finance

Groww — Start Investing Today

India's simplest app to invest in mutual funds, stocks, FDs, and gold. Zero commission on mutual funds. Perfect for first-time investors.

Start Investing Free
💹₹0 Delivery Brokerage
India #1
Personal Finance

Zerodha — Stock Trading Platform

India's largest stockbroker. Zero brokerage on equity delivery. Best for serious investors and traders who want lower costs.

Open Free Account
🌐From ₹69/mo
Best value
AI & Tech

Hostinger — Web Hosting from ₹69/mo

Fast, reliable hosting with free domain and SSL. One-click WordPress installer. Best value hosting for Indian bloggers and devs.

Get Hosting Deal
🎨Free + Pro
Free forever
AI & Tech

Canva Pro — Design Everything

Create stunning graphics, presentations, social posts, and PDFs. The pro plan unlocks 100M+ assets, background remover and brand kits.

Try Canva Free
💪Up to 15% off
Most trusted
Health & Wellness

HealthKart — Supplements & Nutrition

India's largest online store for protein powders, vitamins, and health supplements. Trusted by 10M+ customers with authentic products guaranteed.

Shop HealthKart
💳Free Setup
India's best
Micro Business

Razorpay — Accept Payments Online

India's best payment gateway for freelancers and small businesses. Accept UPI, cards, net banking. Setup in under 10 minutes.
